title: quercus × getica
intro: Quercus × getica, also known as Getic oak or Getic white oak, is a hybrid plant between Quercus robur and Quercus petraea species, typically found in Eastern Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus × getica include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure, thereby supporting cardiovascular health and immune system function. Quercus × getica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used in tinctures and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption and application.
